prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 11397→11773→11908→14906→12977，2024 年因新高考改革首年出现较大波动（后移至 14906），2025 年明显回升至 12977，近 5 年整体呈后移趋势但 2025 年已出现企稳反弹信号；该校在黑龙江省物理类招生计划 2021–2023 年约 138–141 人，2024 年增至 145 人，2025 年 147 人，2026 年计划 143 人，较 2025 年小幅缩招约 2.7%，计划缩减对竞争略有加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 郑州大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从 2021 年第 53 位持续上升至 2026 年第 44 位，排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和认可度增强；2026 年声誉评价为偏负面，但事件以中性管理回应为主，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第 8（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度较高，可能吸引更多考生关注。2025 年黑龙江曾出现 389 分（74217 位）录取事件，但属中外合作护理学特殊类型，对普通类报考心理影响有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 本省 2026 年高考总人数约 167000 人，较 2025 年（172114 人）略有减少，竞争压力小幅缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次企稳回升趋势、2026 年计划小幅缩招、软科排名持续上升及抖音高热带来的关注度增加，预计 2026 年竞争较 2025 年略有加剧，位次在；预测最低位次约 12800 名，区间 12300–13300 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 11397→11773→11908→14906→12977. In 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform, there was a significant fluctuation (shifting to 14906), but in 2025 it clearly rebounded to 12977. Over the past five years, there has been an overall backward trend, but 2025 has shown signs of stabilization and rebound. The university's enrollment plan for physics category in Heilongjiang was about 138–141 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 145 in 2024, 147 in 2025, and planned 143 in 2026, a slight reduction of about 2.7% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhengzhou University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has steadily risen from 53rd in 2021 to 44th in 2026, indicating continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, but the response to events has been mainly neutral management, with no major negative public opinion. The total popularity on Douyin ranks 8th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, attracting more attention from applicants. In 2025, there was an admission incident in Heilongjiang with a score of 389 (ranking 74217), but this was a special type of Sino-foreign cooperative nursing program, which has limited impact on the psychology of regular category applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in the province is about 167,000, a slight decrease from 172,114 in 2025, leading to a slight easing of competition pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stabilization and rebound trend of rankings in 2025, the slight reduction in enrollment plan for 2026, the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings, and the increased attention from high Douyin popularity, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with rankings around; the predicted minimum ranking is about 12,800, with a range of 12,300–13,300.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 12,300–13,300, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 popular majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 12,300), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Science and Clinical Medicine. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 13,300), you should prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
